violations.text: The doors to the outside, located at the side of the cafe, are not tight-fitting. Space observed between the 2 doors (bottom). Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 07/25/2025

The cutting board at the sandwich station is very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 07/22/2025
Refrigerator door gasket of the 2-door lowboy under the espresso machine observed in poor repair, splitting away from the door. Gasket is to be replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 07/31/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine have an accumulation of black/brown residue. These areas are to be cleaned and sanitized. New Violation. Correct By: 07/15/2025

The door to the outside, located at the side of the cafe, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 08/20/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the walk-in shelving and the gasket of the 1-door lowboy unit have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. These areas are to be cleaned. New Violation. Correct By: 08/13/2024
